case_title: CHRISTOPHER DE PAZ VS. MARY ANN BEVERLY

docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR FILING FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-09-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER DE PAZ. DEFENDANT MARY ANN BEVERLY DID NOT APPEAR. DEFENDANT HAD GOOD PROOF OF SERVICE BUT FAILED TO FILE WITH THE COURT. CONTINUED FOR COURT FILING REQUIREMENTS. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS NECESSARY. PARTIES MUST APPEAR IF THEY WISH TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED NOV-29-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEVERLY, MARY ANN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE PAZ, CHRISTOPHER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BEVERLY, MARY ANN PLAINTIFF BEARS THE BURDEN OF PROVING THAT DEFENDANT GAVE PREMISSION TO THE HIT-AND-RUN DRIVER TO USE HER CAR. PLAINTIFF HAS PRESENTED SOME CIRCUMSTANTIAL EVIDENCE (THAT THE TRUCK WAS IN THE NEIGHBORHOOD), BUT NO DIRECT EVIDENCE THAT WOULD ALLOW ME TO IMPOSE LIABILITY HERE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DE PAZ, CHRISTOPHER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-09-2019 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY DE PAZ, CHRISTOPHER AS TO DEFENDANT BEVERLY, MARY ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-26-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DE PAZ, CHRISTOPHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-09-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-09-2019 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF CHRISTOPHER DE PAZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARY ANN BEVERLY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
